claim_firewall: the result is finite-class and local in the deformation coordinate
no physical time oscillation or dynamics claim
no full SU(2)_k category, pentagon, braiding, modular-data or global-gluing claim
no continuum, gravity, matter, mass or defect claim
replication disagreement must be reported and cannot be hidden
A, B, C and D are protocol outcomes, not unrestricted physical interpretations
evidence_policy: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.

frozen_analysis.axial_concentration: R2 = abs((1/8) sum_f exp(2 i phi_f))
frozen_analysis.complex_inner_product: Hermitian, conjugate-linear in the residual argument
frozen_analysis.family_energy_advantage: median of Delta_J over every ordered carrier in the family
frozen_analysis.normalization: unit L2 norm after cubic projection
frozen_analysis.projection: unweighted discrete least squares on the frozen phase grid
frozen_analysis.replication_role: computed under the same mode and control, reported separately, never changes the primary outcome

outcomes.A_UNIVERSAL_PHASE_LOCK: finite-class directional phase locking for the primary complex observable at frozen mode 5
outcomes.B_PHASE_CLASSES: finite-class axial or multi-class phase structure at frozen mode 5; no universal directional phase
outcomes.C_PHASE_HYPOTHESIS_REJECTED: the preregistered mode-5 primary hypothesis is not supported against its frozen matched control
outcomes.D_INCONCLUSIVE: no positive or negative phase conclusion because at least one hard failure occurred

primary_decision_rule.multiplicity: none after calibration; exactly one frozen mode is tested
outcome_precedence: energy criteria pass and R1 >= 0.60 -> A_UNIVERSAL_PHASE_LOCK
energy criteria pass and R1 < 0.60 and R2 >= 0.75 -> B_PHASE_CLASSES

scope.ordered_carrier_derivation: select every ordered carrier in the pinned 283-carrier supplement whose sorted external-label quadruple is one of the eight frozen confirmatory families

title: Confirmatory Test of Frozen q-Curvature Mode 5 on Eight Sealed Families
